# ~~getRegisteredTool()~~

> **Test Support Layer**

```ts
function getRegisteredTool(tools: Record<string, unknown>, name: string): 
  | Record<string, unknown>
  | undefined;
```

Defined in: [src/app/testing/utility/mcp-server-introspection.utility.ts:74](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/3d2831b148eaa4c84c57fa062fce6df920f72a50/src/app/testing/utility/mcp-server-introspection.utility.ts#L74)

Looks up a single registered tool by name from a tools record
obtained via [getRegisteredTools](getRegisteredTools.md).

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type                                                                                               | Description                                                        |
| --------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `tools`   | [`Record`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference)<`string`, `unknown`> | The tools record from [getRegisteredTools](getRegisteredTools.md). |
| `name`    | `string`                                                                                           | The tool name to look up.                                          |

## Returns

\| [`Record`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference)<`string`, `unknown`>
\| `undefined`

The tool configuration record, or `undefined` if not
found.

## Deprecated

No longer imported by any test.  Use `tools/list`
via the MCP protocol instead.

## Remarks

Returns `undefined` when the name is not present or the entry is
not a non-null object, so callers can assert existence without
catching.
